title: calophyllum eputamen
intro: Calophyllum eputamen, also known as the Borneo camphor tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum eputamen include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and bark are used to prepare herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
